channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffitti, 6th May
item.description:
Several graffitti signs at side of Jennings betting shop just off market Square.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 52-54 Belsize park Gardens, 6th May
item.description:
Since moving in there has been missing paving stones on the tree on the pavements outside 52-54 Belsize Park Gardens. It causes mud and dirt from delivery people (who walk through) and also it is difficult to get past as the tree width is approx 6 flagstones, but the entire area missing paving stones is 12 flagstones long (ie lots of missing pavement), especially for wheelchairs and buggies when the bins are out. Can you replace the pavement around the lampost, so the dirt are is small and pavement is repaired. Or put in some of that soft covering, like you have around the trees on Haverstock Hill. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Belsize Park Gardens, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 6th May
item.description:
Overflowing bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bush Hill Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Countdown display incomplete, 6th May
item.description:
Some of the LEDs are nit working making the display difficult to read.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 6th May
item.description:
Graffiti found on the electrical cupboard ground floor. Graffiti on the lift on the third floor and sticker has been put inside lift.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cherry Garden Street, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Mattress and camping gear dumped outside fig court, 6th May

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodmill Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti, 6th May

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Various deep potholes causing serious danger to cyclists. Near exit to Merton Court School. Accident witnessed this morning., 6th May
item.description:
This has been getting worse over the last few months. Now totally unsafe for me as a cyclists I either need to go on to the wrong side of the road or slowly weave round them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mares Tail growing from cracks in the pavement and along fence which is now spreading into my garden, 6th May
item.description:
Mares Tail growing on the pavement in Fairoak Close BR5 1AL and is now spreading into my garden

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rolleston Avenue, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Excessive Litter problem has been found, 6th May
item.description:
End of Moundfield Road requires cleaning - thisend not cleaned for months
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Moundfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle parks abandoned in small public park, 6th May
item.description:
It’s dangerous for kids and animals, it’s prohibited and Lambeth council is failing to do the basics once more. Immediate action required NOW

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prioress Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas Canisters on Keynsham Road, 6th May
item.description:
Discarded gas canisters and boxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th May
item.description:
Park side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole in the road, 6th May
item.description:
There is a hole in the road which is 10cm deep and a size of 40 x 40cm, and is getting bigger day by day due to HVG traffic by local businesses on Upland Road. It needs to be filled in ASPA before a car gets stuck or damaged. The whole was reported as a pothole (The report's reference number is 9209373.) , but has ever since doubled in size and is now a serious concern. for the road user safety.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Upland Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Button for the crossing on side of park is not working this is very dangerous as school kids cross after getting off B14 and for people walking dogs, 6th May
item.description:
Button for the crossing on side of park is not working this is very dangerous as school kids cross after getting off B14 and for people walking dogs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newsagents Pickford lane 3 full litter cages on pavement, 6th May
item.description:
I have reported this already and you advised resolved. This hasn’t been resolved? Still full to brim and one swoop of wind will be over the parade. Why aren’t these cages in their back yard? They shouldn’t be on the concourse outside these shops?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rampant, massive, recurring fly tipping, 6th May
item.description:
This area is constantly filled with litter, rubbish bags and random items.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Perch Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture & household goods dumped, 6th May

Furniture & household goods dumped beside skips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnabas Road, London

item.title: Red untaxed Citroen car has been dumped in the street for over a month and hasnt moved., 6th May
item.description:
Red Citroen GV52 FGG has been dumped in the street for over a month, taking up much needed spaces and parked on a yellow line.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Grove, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has dumped a black bag of rubble and garden waste, 6th May
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a black bag of rubble and green plant cuttings at the tio of my drive , 1st of the right in the culdesac of 10 cattistock road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cattistock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
